column10: Input Legend 🤚 Required for saving projects Required for project calculations Non-essential Read-only, do not edit
column13:
Basic Instructions - Start Here! 🤚 1. Explore our pre-populated sample project 🤚 3. Save the sample project for future reference using the BEAM Menu

4. Use the BEAM Menu to Create new Project

5. Fill in the Required for Saving Projects cells then use the BEAM menu to Save current project 

6. Click Filter Concrete button. This is only required if you are located in Canada and need province-specific concrete EPDs. If you are working in the USA you can skip this step. 

7. Enter your Building and/or Garage Dimension Inputs in the green cells below

8. Select a building section from the tabs along the bottom of the window. Each building assembly has its own tab, from Footings & Slabs to Garage. The sequence is not important     

9. To select materials, scroll options and click the check box in column G. Each time you select a material its emissions will be added to your project total

*Note: If you see zeros in Column H, please ensure you have filled in all the user inputs required for material calculations, e.g. building dimensions, framing spacing, R-value, thickness, etc.

10. Go to the REVIEW tab to see a detailed material summary 

11. Go to the RESULTS tab for an overview and to gain insights on your project

12. Create & save alternative scenarios and compare results in the GENERATE COMPARISON  tab
More Resources

Visit our Quick Start Guide & FAQ
See our Instructions pop-up located in the BEAM Menu 
Visit our BEAM User's Guide.
